# Seismic Inference

**Summary**: The use of seismic data to infer subsurface properties.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-ali|Ali, 2016]] applied seismic-inference to identify fluid contacts in the Arab formation.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2016-ali|Ali, 2016]] ['fluid identification', 'joint-inversion']

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2016-ali|Ali, 2016]] ['seismic-interpretation']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Inversion of acoustic velocity and impedance provided evidence for distinct pore fluids. ([[2016-ali|Ali, 2016, p. 86]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2016-ali|Ali, 2016]] Non-uniqueness in inversion results.
